jp.title: 山崎賢人＆吉沢亮の8年にわたる成長 『キングダム』佐藤信介監督が明かす
jp.description: 原泰久の人気漫画を実写映画化したシリーズの第5弾『キングダム　魂の決戦』（7月17日公開）の佐藤信介監督が、主人公の秦国の武将・信と、国王のエイ政（※エイ政のエイは、上に亡、中に口、下左から月、女、迅のつくりが正式表記）を演じた山崎賢人（※「崎」は「たつさき」）と吉沢亮について語った。

jp.title: 宮舘涼太が「ディズニー・オン・アイス」スペシャルアクトで美声披露、ミッキーらと夢の共演飾る

world.title: Astronomers express outrage after regulators approve 'space mirror' permit
world.description: Proposal involves the launch of a private satellite to test reflecting sunlight onto the Earth’s surface

world.title: Regulators investigating why CN workers were forced to flee wildfires on foot

world.title: Lucas Herbert storms to British Open lead
world.description: There was so much red on Lucas Herbert’s scorecard Friday it looked like it was bleeding during his British Open second round at Royal Birkdale. He was in perfect position to do so at 9-under-par for the day and poised to shoot at least a 61 as he stood on the par-5 17th tee.

world.title: 'A godsend' - Woman, 102, on supports during hot weather
world.description: A 102-year-old woman has described as a "godsend" the support she receives during the current hot spell, amid calls to support older and vulnerable people amid high temperatures.

world.title: Uganda school bus crash kills 20 children and 1 adult
world.description: Uganda halts school trips after bus crashes returning from waterfall field trip; at least a dozen also injured.

world.title: Spain v Argentina: Johan Cruyff’s legacy clear as the nation that shaped Messi faces its masterpiece
world.description: The World Cup final pits the Spanish collective against the most extravagant talent to emerge from its football culture

world.title: California AG Rob Bonta says a CNN spin-off wouldn’t resolve Paramount-WBD lawsuit
world.description: Lawyers for the 12-state coalition trying to block the Paramount–Warner Bros. Discovery deal will be in court on Friday arguing that a temporary restraining order (TRO) is necessary to stop the companies from completing the merger.

world.title: RIL Q2 FY27 results: Reliance Industries beats estimates with record quarterly EBITDA; revenue rises 25% yoy
world.description: India Business News: RIL results: Mukesh Ambani-led Reliance Industries Ltd (RIL), India's most valuable company, posted its highest-ever quarterly core profit and EBITDA .

world.title: Two SANDF members die after falling into abandoned mine shaft
world.description: Two South African National Defence Force (SANDF) members who slipped and fell into an abandoned mine shaft in West Johannesburg have died.
